Our Venue

Heritage Hall

3102 Main St.
Vancouver, BC
V5T 3G7

At the intersection of Main and 15th Avenue.

Heritage Hall is an iconic landmark in Vancouver's Mount Pleasant neighbourhood. Known for its elegant architecture and clock tower, the building first opened in 1916. Built as a Post Office and used as a Federal administrative building until the 1970s when it fell out of use. Community and non-profit groups saw the potential. They rallied to preserve the building and partnered with the City of Vancouver. Today a variety of non-profit organizations occupy the offices in the building. The classic ballroom on the main floor is an ideal location for weddings, craft fairs and community events of all kinds.

  • 12:00

    End of the Night

    You don't have to go home, but you can't stay here.

⚙ For the couple: To activate form submissions, see the setup instructions below the form.

⚙ Setup Instructions (remove before sharing)

Step 1. Create a new Google Sheet. Name the columns:

Timestamp | Name | Party | Attendance | Email | Dietary


Step 2. In the Sheet, go to Extensions → Apps Script and paste this code:

function doPost(e) {
  var sheet = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet().getActiveSheet();
  var data = JSON.parse(e.postData.contents);
  sheet.appendRow([
    new Date(),
    data.name,
    data.party,
    data.attendance,
    data.email,
    data.dietary
  ]);
  return ContentService
    .createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({result:"success"}))
    .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

Step 3. Click Deploy → New Deployment → Web App. Set "Who has access" to Anyone. Copy the Web App URL.


Step 4. In this HTML file, find this line near the bottom of the <script> tag:

const SHEET_URL = 'YOUR_GOOGLE_APPS_SCRIPT_URL_HERE';

Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_APPS_SCRIPT_URL_HERE with your Web App URL.


Step 5. Delete this entire setup instructions block and the setup-notice div at the top of the RSVP section. Done!
